title: DAECHAP - Echap Style Menu
description: Echap Menu Style Medieval RPG for Minecraft
body:
# **DAECHAP**

**DAECHAP** is a lightweight and elegant client-side mod for Forge 1.20.1 that replaces the default ESC menu with a modern, clean, and user-friendly interface.
Perfect for builders, modpack creators, or players who value polished design.

## **✨ Features
## **📋 Minimal ESC Menu Redesign

Centered layout with 3 custom buttons:

▶️ Continue – Instantly resume your game

⚙️ Options – Access Minecraft settings

❌ Quit Game – Exit Minecraft immediately

📖 Mods Installed – View all mods currently loaded

🎨 Stylish Custom Buttons

Button size: 200x30 px

Custom texture: button.png (236x60 px)

Smooth hover effect: text color changes from white to brown

## **🧽 Lightweight & Stable**

No performance impact

Clean, uncluttered layout

Fast, responsive, and professional look

**✅ Compatibility**

✔️ Minecraft: 1.20.1

✔️ Modloader: Forge

✔️ Client-side only
